narrative.description: League of Legends is a competitive MOBA where teams of five champions push three lanes, secure objectives, and teamfight to destroy the enemy Nexus.
narrative.core_loop: Pick a champion, farm minions and jungle camps, purchase item power spikes, coordinate vision and objectives, and siege the enemy base.

mechanics.map_notes: In League of Legends, teams push minion waves along lanes toward enemy structures.
mechanics.expression: In League of Legends, teams push minion waves along lanes toward enemy structures.

mechanics.map_notes: In League of Legends, weapons, armor, and accessories occupy distinct equipment slots and modify combat stats and abilities.
mechanics.expression: In League of Legends, weapons, armor, and accessories occupy distinct equipment slots and modify combat stats and abilities.

mechanics.map_notes: In League of Legends, defeating enemies or completing objectives grants experience that increases character stats such as HP, attack, or defense.
mechanics.expression: In League of Legends, defeating enemies or completing objectives grants experience that increases character stats such as HP, attack, or defense.

mechanics.map_notes: In League of Legends, direct player control over attacks, dodges, and combos in real time.
mechanics.expression: In League of Legends, direct player control over attacks, dodges, and combos in real time.

mechanics.map_notes: In League of Legends, limited ammo, healing, and save resources force careful risk assessment.
mechanics.expression: In League of Legends, limited ammo, healing, and save resources force careful risk assessment.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience League of Legends through its core moba loop.
